value.found_quote: Anthropic's Claude Cowork—launched in January 2026—represents something different entirely: an AI agent that can actually modify your files and automate complex workflows.
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes "Claude Cowork" as an offering from Anthropic, launched in January 2026. It provides extensive detail about its features, pricing ($20–200/month), platform (Mac only), and compares it against NotebookLM and Elephas. The page treats it as a currently available (generally active) product as of early 2026, with no indication it is deprecated or sunset.
